page.title: Category:All Wikipedia articles written in Canadian English

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}} Articles written in [[Canadian English]]. [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Use Canadian English]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Monthly clean-up category (Use Canadian English) counter]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Wikipedia articles written in a national variety of English|Canadian English]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] {{CatAutoTOC}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Use Canadian English]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 2 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]].↵" to " "
Adding [[Category:undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Removing from [[Category:Undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8235654)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q8235654}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:All Wikipedia articles written in Canadian English]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Monthly clean-up category (Use Canadian English) counter]]
[[Category:Wikipedia articles written in a national variety of English|Canadian English]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_Wikipedia_articles_written_in_Canadian_English here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
